reviews.comment:
Muy bien atendido. Hicieron cambio de aceite y filtros de modo experto y a buen precio. Tomé un buen café y rico sánguche. Lamento mucho que no haya taller mecánico, insólito después de tantos años

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. They expertly changed the oil and filters at a good price. I had a good coffee and a delicious sandwich. I'm very sorry there's no mechanic's shop, which is unusual after so many years.

reviews.comment:
Está limpio y tiene menúes rápidos y sabrosos y a buen precio.  La atencion es dispar según quién la haga, pero podria mejorar en gral.

(Translated by Google)
It's clean and has quick, tasty, and reasonably priced menus. The service varies depending on who's working, but it could be improved overall.
